segments.text: listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 弗兰克的第一份工作是什么？

segments.text: Yesterday afternoon, Frank Hawkins was telling me about his experiences as a young man.

translations.zh-Hans: 昨天下午，弗兰克·霍金斯向我讲述了他年轻时的经历。

segments.text: Before he retired, Frank was the head of a very large business company, but as a boy, he used to work in a small shop.

translations.zh-Hans: 退休前，弗兰克是一家大公司的负责人；但小时候，他曾在一家小商店工作。

segments.text: It was his job to repair bicycles, and at that time, he used to work 14 hours a day.

translations.zh-Hans: 他的工作是修理自行车，那时他每天要工作14个小时。

segments.text: He saved money for years, and in 1958, he bought a small workshop of his own.

translations.zh-Hans: 他多年积蓄钱财，并于1958年买下了自己的一个小作坊。

segments.text: In his twenties, Frank used to make spare parts for airplanes.

translations.zh-Hans: 二十多岁时，弗兰克曾制造飞机零配件。

segments.text: At that time, he had two helpers.
In a few years, the small workshop had become a large factory which employed 728 people.

translations.zh-Hans: 几年后，小作坊变成了一家雇有728人的大工厂。

segments.text: Frank smiled when he remembered his hard early years and the long road to success.

translations.zh-Hans: 回想起早年的艰苦岁月和漫长的成功之路，弗兰克笑了。

segments.text: He was still smiling when the door opened and his wife came in.

translations.zh-Hans: 门打开、妻子进来时，他仍在笑。

segments.text: She wanted him to repair their grandson's bicycle.

translations.zh-Hans: 她要他修理孙子的自行车。
